key_evidence: April 18, 2026 DRC-M23 joint statement on ceasefire mechanism, prisoner release, humanitarian access — BND/S5 partial positive
M23 continues to demand immunity from prosecution for war crimes — blocks ACC anchor progression
UN Security Council (SC/16322) reports eastern DRC situation continues to deteriorate despite ceasefire
Both sides accuse each other of ongoing violations
notes: No band change. Published scoring appears to pre-date 2024-2026 M23 escalation (Goma fall Jan 2025).
